title: Defect in btor2 file format generation
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.36 (git sha1 8f07a0d84, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Use the verific command in yosys to parse this project: https://github.com/aytung94/DV_S2QED_RISCV/tree/master/rtl/mriscvcore

The content of yosys script is:
verific -vlog-incdir ./;
verific -sv \
./ALU/ALU.v \
./DECO_INSTR/DECO_INSTR.v \
./FSM/FSM.v \
./IRQ/IRQ.v \
./MEMORY_INTERFACE/MEMORY_INTERFACE.v \
./MULT/MULT.v \
./REG_FILE/REG_FILE.v \
./UTILITIES/UTILITY.v \
./mriscvcore.v \
./rv32_opcodes.v \
./jg_bind_wrapper.sv \
./mriscvcore_top_s2qed.v ;

verific -import mriscvcore_top_s2qed;

prep -top mriscvcore_top_s2qed;

hierarchy -check;

chformal -assume -early;

memory;

flatten;

sim -clock clk -resetn rstn -n 5 -rstlen 5 -zinit -w mriscvcore_top_s2qed;

setundef -undriven -expose;

write_btor fsm.btor2;


### Expected Behavior

produce the correct btor2 word-level file

### Actual Behavior

Just a few short lines in generated btor2 file:
; BTOR description generated by Yosys 0.36 (git sha1 8f07a0d84, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os) for module mriscvcore_top_s2qed.
1 sort bitvec 1
2 input 1 clk ; ../../verilog/mriscvcore/S2QEDFiles/mriscvcore_top_s2qed.v:3.9-3.12
3 input 1 rstn ; ../../verilog/mriscvcore/S2QEDFiles/mriscvcore_top_s2qed.v:3.14-3.18
; end of yosys output

Use pono(https://github.com/stanford-centaur/pono) solver to solve this btor2 file, a result as follows is produced:
Property index 0 is greater than the number of properties in file ./fsm.btor2 (0)
error
b0
Pono wall clock time (s): 0.000207784
